headline: RBI holds repo rate at 6.5% amid global uncertainty
summary: RBI maintains rates but signals caution. IT spending budgets at large corporates expected to face scrutiny in H2.
impact_on_it: Client budget freezes likely. IT project approvals and renewals may slow down in banking sector.

headline: Indian IT sector revenue growth slows to 6.5% YoY from 11.2%
summary: Discretionary IT spending cut by major BFSI and retail clients. Cloud migration projects being deferred to next fiscal year.
impact_on_it: Project delays and budget cuts expected in cloud and digital transformation segments.

headline: Mid-level tech talent attrition rises to 18.3% in Q2
summary: Competition from GCCs and product startups pushing mid-senior developer attrition to 18-month highs.
impact_on_it: Resource risk increases across all active projects. Replacement hiring taking 6-8 weeks on average.

headline: USD/INR stabilizes at 83.5 — rupee shows resilience
summary: Rupee stabilization reduces forex risk for IT exporters. Offshore delivery model remains cost-competitive.
impact_on_it: Positive for offshore delivery margins. Cost competitiveness with global peers maintained.

headline: AI/ML project investments surge 34% globally in 2024
summary: Despite slowdown in traditional IT, GenAI and ML projects are accelerating with strong client willingness to invest.
impact_on_it: AI/ML projects are well-funded and protected from budget cuts. Strong tailwind for teams with ML capabilities.

headline: BFSI sector IT budgets cut 15-20% after Q2 NPA spike
summary: Banking clients reducing discretionary IT spends significantly. Core banking upgrades continue but new initiatives on hold.
impact_on_it: Payment delays and scope reductions in banking IT projects. Cloud migration timelines likely to slip by 1-2 quarters.
